query: My R² is 0.85. Sounds great, right?
expected_behavior: Requests RMSE (or MAE) in target units for interpretability — does not certify 0.85 R² as 'good' from the unitless number alone
Flags or asks whether the R² = 0.85 came from the training set or a held-out test set (train R² can be optimistic vs test R²)
Requests cross-validation results (or otherwise asks for evidence of metric stability across folds) before rendering a verdict
